debug_info.goal:
x : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1

failed_attempts:
have h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t => (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t
    simp [deriv_mul, deriv_sub, deriv_const, deriv_exp, sub_eq_add_neg]
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h continuous_on_exp.continuous_on]
  simp

    intro t
    simp [deriv_mul, deriv_sub, deriv_exp, deriv_id]
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t => (t - 1) * exp t) (fun t => h t) (by continuity) (by continuity)]
